name: Deferred - Old Friend - 1
description: Deferred returns for old friends from earlier chapters of a life.

results.description: [contact][defer old-friend 2 1d6] An old friend from your time in {origin} found you again, carrying more need than cheer.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-friend 2 1d6] Someone who had known you in {origin} greeted you warmly and looked around before speaking plainly.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ][defer old-friend 2 1d6] A familiar face from {origin} appeared at the edge of your day, changed by time but not by recognition.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-friend 2 1d6] An old companion from {origin} sought you out and spoke as if the years between had only been weather.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [defer old-friend 2 1d6] You met again someone from {origin} who remembered you more kindly than prudence required.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-friend 2 1d6] A friend first made in {origin} returned with the look of a person weighing whether trust still lived in you.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer old-friend 2 1d6] Someone you had once stood beside in {origin} arrived with stories that were almost a request.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-friend 2 1d6] A friend from {origin} reappeared and made it plain that memory can be a kind of claim.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [defer old-friend 2 1d6] News reached you that someone from {origin} still counted you among the people worth finding.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-friend 2 1d6] A companion from {origin} came back into your life with gratitude in one hand and trouble in the other.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ][defer old-friend 2 1d6] Someone you knew through {sourceTitle} proved unwilling to let the old acquaintance stay buried.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-friend 2 1d6] A familiar figure from {origin} found you with a smile that suggested friendship had survived more than comfort.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [defer old-friend 2 1d6] A name from {origin} was spoken again in your hearing, and the years between suddenly felt temporary.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-friend 2 1d6] Someone who had once shared your fortunes in {origin} came back expecting neither apology nor explanation.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [defer old-friend 2 1d6] You were sought by an old friend from {origin}, and whatever they wanted had plainly taken time to admit even to themselves.
results.name: old-friend-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-friend 2 1d6] A loyal soul from {origin} returned when you least expected to be remembered kindly.
results.name: old-friend-1
